notes.text: Login flow is confusing — too many steps before reaching the dashboard
notes.author: user_1

notes.text: We should add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
notes.author: user_2

notes.text: Color coding sticky notes helps with categorization
notes.author: user_3

notes.text: Onboarding tour would reduce support tickets significantly
notes.author: user_1

notes.text: Export to PDF is a must for stakeholder reports
notes.author: user_4

notes.text: Real-time cursor presence boosts collaboration feeling
notes.author: user_2

notes.text: Mobile support is critical — 40% of users are on phones
notes.author: user_5

notes.text: Search across boards is a top feature request
notes.author: user_3

notes.text: Undo/redo history should be unlimited or at least 50 steps
notes.author: user_1

notes.text: Templates gallery would accelerate session setup
notes.author: user_4

notes.text: Voting on sticky notes is great but needs clearer UI
notes.author: user_2

notes.text: Accessibility: screen reader support for board canvas
notes.author: user_5

notes.text: Locking elements prevents accidental moves in live sessions
notes.author: user_3

notes.text: Timer widget helps keep workshops on schedule
notes.author: user_1

notes.text: Guest access without sign-up reduces friction for new users
notes.author: user_4

notes.text: Board performance degrades with >200 elements — needs virtualization
notes.author: user_2

notes.text: Dark mode support is highly requested in user feedback
notes.author: user_5

notes.text: Drag-to-group should snap to a grid for cleaner layouts
notes.author: user_3

notes.text: Comments on notes enable async collaboration post-session
notes.author: user_1

notes.text: Notification system needed — users miss replies on notes
notes.author: user_4

notes.text: Tagging notes with labels would complement color coding
notes.author: user_2

notes.text: Breakout rooms for large workshops are essential
notes.author: user_5

notes.text: Sticker pack integration would make brainstorming more fun
notes.author: user_3

notes.text: Offline mode for low-connectivity environments
notes.author: user_1

notes.text: Analytics dashboard to track engagement per session
notes.author: user_4

notes.text: Auto-save on every change prevents data loss
notes.author: user_2

notes.text: Resizable sticky notes for longer content
notes.author: user_5

notes.text: Cluster detection to auto-group related notes by proximity
notes.author: user_3

notes.text: Presenter mode to guide participants through the board
notes.author: user_1

notes.text: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance should be a baseline requirement
notes.author: user_4
